title: FLOSS Weekly 499: Vaadin
summary:
Dr. Joonas Lehtinen is the founder/CEO of Vaadin - a platform used by 150,000+ developers worldwide. He leads a team of 150+ people mostly based in Turku, Berlin and Silicon Valley who live, breath and write open source with passion to help people build better web apps. While not in a hangout 10 time zones away from San Jose where he is based, you can probably find him in a developer conference somewhere in US or Europe.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.
Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
